// 00 — Personal Profile

Who I Am

📍 Windsor, ON 🎓 St. Clair College 🎙 PBP & Colour 🌐 Remote & On-Site

I'm MothEyez

// My Goals in Esports

  • Become a full-time play-by-play broadcaster for a major esports title at the regional or national level.
  • Run a Content Creator Tournament or Event that brings the community together.
  • Delve deeper into understanding every aspect of broadcast production — from technical ops to show direction.
  • Build a recognized on-air brand known for energy, precision, and authentic storytelling.
  • Represent Canada on the international esports broadcasting stage.

// Education & Training

Broadcast Production Training
St. Clair College Broadcast Team — Windsor, Ontario
2 Years — Ongoing

Extensive hands-on training covering all aspects of broadcast production — technical operations, camera work, on-air talent, and live event execution across the full SGS broadcast cycle.

// Broadcasting & Casting Experience

Caster / Play-by-Play Commentator
Toronto XP 4 — Call of Duty League Event
2024–2025

Provided live play-by-play and colour commentary for the Toronto XP 4 Call of Duty league event, delivering broadcast coverage to a competitive online and live audience.

Caster / Commentator
Pressure Point 2025
2025

Cast competitive matches at Pressure Point 2025, maintaining high-energy broadcast quality throughout the full event.

Caster — Pokémon VGC Midseason Showdown
Tetra Series
2025

Cast the Pokémon Video Game Championships Midseason Showdown for the Tetra Series, bringing energy and strategic analysis to one of gaming's most beloved competitive scenes.

// Production & Event Direction

Producer / Director
SGS — St. Clair Gaming Series
2023–Present

Led production for the SGS broadcast, overseeing technical setup, talent direction, and live show flow. Coordinated multi-camera shoots, graphics, and stream integration for competitive esports broadcasts.

Production Observer
PUBG Publisher Event
2026

Served as a production observer at an official PUBG publisher-level event, gaining direct exposure to top-tier esports broadcast pipelines and professional production standards.

Event Director / Project Manager
Winter WonderLAN 2025
2025

Directed and managed the Winter WonderLAN LAN event from conception to execution — overseeing logistics, staffing, scheduling, and on-site broadcast operations.

Key Project Manager
Sakura Anime Fest 2026 — Windsor, ON
2026

Key project manager for Sakura Anime Fest 2026. Contributed directly to planning and execution of an event that broke all-time Windsor attendance records with 610 attendees.

Let's Work Together

I'm Mathias "MothEyez" Talbot — an esports broadcaster, commentator, and event producer with 2+ years of hands-on experience across collegiate, scholastic, and publisher-level esports.

Based in Windsor, Ontario & available for remote and in-person events across Canada. Whether you need a sharp play-by-play voice, colour commentary, or full broadcast production, let's build something great.
